title: OP_PUSH request body
description: Push body for a single event into a registered event source. The event_name comes from the URL path (HTTP) or routing prefix (TCP) — only the fields dict is in the wire body. Per ADR-002 op renames have no effect on push body shapes (push targets events, not aggregations).

fields.description: Event fields matching the registered event schema. Field names and types must match what the @bv.event declared.
